title: CAL Services and Location Analysis
generatedFrom: CAL Services and Location Analysis 2022 to July 7 2026.xlsx

espressoSplit.definition: A deal counts as espresso if it includes Espresso Service. Revenue is not split within multi-service deals.

definitions.revenue: Won deals at real dollar value. Show Close Date drives year/month bucketing.
definitions.oneOffCustom: Workbook 'Insufficient Data' shows (under 3 years of history) plus any acronym absent from the pattern classification, so summary views total to grand revenue.

reconciliation.note: Two National deals carry no show acronym (Washington $5,645; city Unknown $13,195). They are retained in grand, city, and One-Off/Custom totals as the (Unspecified) show.
